metadata:
  rationale: "YAGNI: no consumer implements or calls retainToOmp. Keeping it on the interface is misleading documentation of a planned feature, not existing functionality. Deleting it is reversible by re-adding the field."
  source: inference
  alternatives: "Implement retainToOmp with OMP memory bridge — premature without known API contract, Keep dead interface member — misleading, pollutes API surface"
  tags: "risk, v1.0, retainToOmp, YAGNI"
---
retainToOmp on NoesisRuntime interface should be deleted as safest default path — no consumer exists, no implementation exists, it's speculative dead code. Adding it back later with real OMP API integration is trivial.
